use_cases: Display subscription pricing tiers with benefits
Allow users to select and subscribe to different plans
Show feature comparison across subscription levels
Convert free users to paid subscribers
Handle monthly and annual billing options
ai_summary: A subscription pricing screen component designed to showcase tiered subscription plans with feature comparisons, typically used by SaaS applications to convert free users to paid customers. Includes interactive pricing cards with selection states and call-to-action buttons for plan selection.
